slices.title: Inbound mail webhook creates an automation run
SharePoint document sync surfaces in the files list
slices.blockerSummary: Graph delta token rejected by sandbox tenant; video honestly shows the failed sync. Logged in docs/decisions.md; build continued.

_field_notes.purpose: Single durable handover index. Survives context compaction (autothing re-reads it to resume) and is the human-readable handover. NOTE: the /goal evaluator reads only the transcript — a small fast model that does not open files — so autothing must ALSO print the global-gate verdict into the conversation. This file is for resume + the human; the printed line is what the evaluator confirms.
_field_notes.slices[].status: passed | failed | blocked | in_progress  (mirrors that slice's gate-status.json)
_field_notes.slices[].flagged: true = honest-failure run (video shows it not working). Counts as recorded evidence, not a pass.
_field_notes.globalGate.status: in_progress | passed | completed-with-blockers. 'passed' ONLY when every objective exit==0, verifyApp/designAudit verdict=='clean', AND everySliceVideoVerified==true. If buildable work is exhausted but any slice is blocked or its video is not verified, the terminal state is 'completed-with-blockers' (enumerated in the handover) — never reported as 'passed'.
_field_notes.everySliceVideoVerified: true ONLY when every non-skipped slice has gates.video.status == 'verified'. A 'failed-but-unblocking' video does NOT count as verified — it forces 'completed-with-blockers', matching the /goal condition 'a self-verified video exists for every slice'.
